label: Run all Polar tests in current file
command: read_dotenv_var() { key="$1"; env_file="$ZED_WORKTREE_ROOT/.env"; [ -f "$env_file" ] || return 0; sed -nE "s/^[[:space:]]*${key}[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*//p" "$env_file" | sed -n '1p' | sed -E 's/[[:space:]]+$//' | sed -E 's/^"(.*)"$/\1/' | sed -E "s/^'(.*)'$/\1/" | tr -d '\r'; }; if [ -z "$OSO_AUTH" ]; then OSO_AUTH=$(read_dotenv_var OSO_AUTH); [ -n "$OSO_AUTH" ] && export OSO_AUTH; fi; if [ -z "$OSO_URL" ]; then OSO_URL=$(read_dotenv_var OSO_URL); [ -n "$OSO_URL" ] && export OSO_URL; fi; if [ -z "$OSO_AUTH" ]; then echo "OSO_AUTH is not set. Set it in your shell environment or add OSO_AUTH=... to $ZED_WORKTREE_ROOT/.env"; exit 1; fi; if command -v oso-cloud >/dev/null 2>&1; then oso-cloud test "$ZED_FILE"; elif command -v oso-cloud-local >/dev/null 2>&1; then oso-cloud-local test "$ZED_FILE"; else echo "Could not find oso-cloud or oso-cloud-local in PATH"; exit 127; fi
